privileged_info_summary: This task uses a synthetic patient named Maria Santos (DOB 1975-08-22, age 50) created programmatically via SQL INSERT in the OSCAR EMR Docker environment. The patient is configured with a diabetes diagnosis (ICD code 250, Diabetes Mellitus, dated 2020-01-15) and a baseline HbA1c measurement from 4 months prior (7.2%). The required lab tests (Glucose fasting, HbA1c, Lipid Profile, Creatinine) are real Ontario OHIP-covered laboratory tests used for diabetes management. The Ontario Lab Requisition form is based on the real Ontario Ministry of Health standard laboratory requisition form. OSCAR EMR credentials are the default development/demo credentials (username: oscardoc, password: oscar, PIN: 1117). All data is synthetic and generated for this testing scenario.
